name: Banana Pineapple Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve the drained pineapple juice.
2. In a medium bowl, layer cabbage, carrots, and pineapple.
3. In a small bowl, combine Miracle Whip, sour cream, honey, and 1 tablespoon of the reserved pineapple juice. Blend well.
4. Spoon and spread the dressing over the salad.
5. Sprinkle with pecans.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. Just prior to serving, add sliced banana, toss, and serve.
